overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic open-world game showing a character in a long coat and hat walking up a mountain trail toward a wooden lookout tower. The character approaches and passes a wooden wagon parked near the rocky outcrop before continuing along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain hiking trail with rocky cliff face

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up the mountain trail toward the distant wooden lookout tower

entered.detail: large gray rock formation rising steeply on the left side of the trail
narrow dirt and stone path winding up the mountainside
green bushes and tall grass lining the right side of the path
multi-level wooden structure perched on rocky outcrop ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow mountain trail bordered by a steep rocky cliff on the left and scrub vegetation on the right. The path winds upward toward a wooden lookout tower visible in the distance against a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky clearing with wooden tower and wagon

events.description: wooden wagon comes into view parked near the base of the lookout tower

agents.ego_description: continuing up the trail approaching the wooden wagon and tower structure

entered.detail: old wooden cart with large wheels parked beside the trail near the tower

segments.scene_description: As the character approaches the destination, a wooden wagon becomes visible parked near the base of the rocky outcrop. The lookout tower looms larger ahead while the initial cliff face recedes to the left. The path remains surrounded by green vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain clearing past the tower

events.description: character passes the wooden wagon and continues beyond the tower structure

agents.ego_description: walking past the wagon and tower, continuing along the trail into more open terrain

entered.detail: open grassy area replacing the rocky cliff on the left side

segments.scene_description: The character passes the wooden wagon and moves beyond the lookout tower, which now falls behind to the left. The terrain opens up into a grassy clearing as the rocky cliff disappears from view. The wagon remains visible parked on the right side of the trail as the character continues forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a winding mountain trail that transitions from a narrow cliffside path into an open grassy clearing. It begins with the character walking upward between a steep rocky cliff and scrub vegetation, with a distant wooden lookout tower visible against a partly cloudy sky. As the character advances, the cliff face recedes to the left and a wooden wagon comes into view parked near the base of the outcrop while the tower looms larger ahead. The scene then shifts as the character passes the wagon and moves beyond the lookout tower, which falls behind to the left. Finally, the terrain opens up into a wide grassy clearing as the rocky cliff disappears entirely from view.
